zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Fitzhugh於大約1300年出生在英國素福爾可肯特維爾時，她的父親Warin FitzHugh32歲，母親Maria Schwaban32歲。她於大約1319年與Walter De Clopton在英國英格蘭素福爾可肯特維爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1377年在英國素福爾可波斯林福德享年79歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可克萊爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Fitzhugh于大约1300年出生在英国素福爾可肯特維爾时，她的父亲Warin FitzHugh32岁，母亲Maria Schwaban32岁。她于大约1319年与Walter De Clopton在英国英格兰素福爾可肯特維爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1377年在英国素福爾可波斯林福德享年79岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可克萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzhugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Fitzhugh was born about 1300, in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, her father, Warin FitzHugh, was 32 and her mother, Maria Schwaban, was 32. She married Walter De Clopton about 1319, in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1377, in Poslingford, Suffolk, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Clare, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Fitzhugh est née environ 1300, à Kentwell, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Warin FitzHugh, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maria Schwaban, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Walter De Clopton environ 1319, à Kentwell, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1377, à Poslingford, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Fitzhugh um 1300 in Kentwell, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Warin FitzHugh 32 und ihre Mutter Maria Schwaban 32. Sie hat um 1319 in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Walter De Clopton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1377 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Poslingford, Suffolk, England und wurde in Clare, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Fitzhugh è nata il circa 1300 nel Kentwell, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Warin FitzHugh, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Maria Schwaban, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Walter De Clopton circa 1319, nel Kentwell, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1377, nel Poslingford, Suffolk, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Clare, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Fitzhughが約1300年にイギリススフォルクケントウエルで生まれた時，父Warin FitzHughは32歳，母Maria Schwabanは32歳であった。約1319年にイギリスイギリススフォルクケントウエルでWalter De Cloptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1377年にイギリススフォルクポスリングフォードで79歳で死去し，イギリススフォルククラーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Fitzhugh(이)가 대략 1300년 영국 수폴크 켄트웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warin FitzHugh(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria Schwaban(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1319년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 켄트웰에서 Walter De Clopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1377년 영국 수폴크 포슬링퍼드에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 클래르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Fitzhugh nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Warin FitzHugh, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Maria Schwaban, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter De Clopton aproximadamente 1319, em Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1377, em Poslingford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Fitzhugh родилась около 1300 г. в местности кэнтвелл, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Warin FitzHugh было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maria Schwaban, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter De Clopton около 1319 г. в местности кэнтвелл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1377 г. в местности послингфорд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности клар, суффолк, Англия.
